hero.title: Explore Vietnam In Your Own Rhythm.
hero.description: From Phu Quoc Island to the mountain roads of the north, every itinerary is shaped to feel immersive, calm, and effortless from stop to stop.

about.title: Trips curated with care and a steady hand.
about.description: We tailor every route to the pace of each group, balancing memorable stops, manageable travel time, and clear support before and during the trip.
about.card1Desc: Custom itineraries shaped for families, friends, or private groups.
about.card2Desc: Clear line items so planning stays easy and decisions stay confident.

reasons.title: Why Travel With Us
reasons.item1Desc: Each itinerary is adapted to the group, the trip length, and the mood you want.
reasons.item2Desc: We blend iconic stops with grounded local experiences that stay memorable.
reasons.item3Desc: Hotline, Zalo, Messenger, and email move together as one support flow.
reasons.item4Desc: A transparent quote structure makes comparison and approval much easier.

services.title: Featured Services
services.item1Desc: Day trips that combine leisure, speedboat transfers, photo stops, and sea experiences.
services.item2Desc: Smoother pacing and more comfortable stops for multi-generation groups.
services.item3Desc: Team activities, relaxation, and logistics brought together in one tidy plan.
services.item4Desc: Tickets, transfers, and scenic stops packaged neatly for peak travel periods.

testimonials.title: What Travelers Say
testimonials.item1Quote: The trip felt seamless, support was fast, and the pace worked beautifully for our family with children.
testimonials.item2Quote: The Phu Quoc tour was carefully personalized. It felt like traveling with someone who truly knows the island.
testimonials.item3Quote: The contact section and map cards were especially helpful. They made booking decisions much faster.

contact.title: Start planning the next trip now.
